hooks.command: $dir = 'C:\Users\xDrew760x\Documents\projects\agentic-agency\output\office'; if (-not (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Start-Process powershell -WindowStyle Minimized -ArgumentList "-NoProfile -Command `"Set-Location '$dir'; npm run dev`"" }; if (-not (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5174 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Start-Process powershell -WindowStyle Minimized -ArgumentList "-NoProfile -Command `"Set-Location '$dir'; node event-server.js`"" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Start-Process 'http://localhost:5173'
